interpretation.performance_status: observability improvement; roughly wall-time neutral relative to 20260706
interpretation.main_finding: large wall-time and Dask-gap improvement occurred between 20260704 and 20260706 before the split appeared as separate task groups
interpretation.likely_july4_to_july6_cause: FITS preview artifact rendering and Prefect artifact publication moved from always-on image/mosaic behavior to opt-in settings that default false in benchmark parsets
interpretation.next_scalability_target: filter_skymodel resource use and task placement
interpretation.confidence: high for the orchestration-gap reduction; external-tool and parallel-gridding changes may contribute to smaller compute-time differences
interpretation.next_step: benchmark filter_skymodel worker/thread/resource settings before adding another image-sector task boundary
